knowledge.html:
I. DANH TU (NOUN) - Vị trí trong câu

Vị tríVí dụ
1. Chu ngu của câuMaths is the subject I like best
2. Sau tính từ (good, beautiful...)
Sau tính từ sở hữu (my, your, his, her...)
Cum danh từ: a/an thế + (adv) + adj + N		She is a good teacher.
His father works in hospital.
3. Lam tân ngữ, sau động từI like English.
We are students.
4. Sau "enough" (enough + N)He didn't have enough money to buy that car.
5. Sau các mạo từ (a, an, thế)
Sau dai từ chỉ dinh (this, that, these, those)
Sau lượng từ (each, no, any, a few, a little...)		She is a teacher.
This book is an interesting book.
I have a little money to go to the movie.
6. Sau giới từ: in, on, of, with, under, at...Thanh is good at literature.
Dấu hiệu nhận biết danh từ:
-ion (distribution), -ment (development), -er (teacher), -or (actor), -ant (accountant), -age (marriage), -ship (friendship), -sm (enthusiasm), -ity (ability), -ness (happiness), -dom (freedom), -ist (terrorist), -ian (physician), -hood (childhood), -ance (importance), -ence (dependence), -ety (society), -ty (honesty)

II. TINH TU (ADJECTIVE) - Vị trí trong câu

Vị tríVí dụ
1. Truoc danh từ: (a/an/thế) + (adv) + adj + NMy Tam is a famous singer.
2. Sau động từ lien ket: be/seem/appear/feel/taste/look/keep/get/keep/make (sb) + adjTom seems tired now.
The homework keeps me busy all the time.
3. Sau "too": S + be/seem/look... + too + adjCoffee seems too hot for me to drink.
4. Truoc "enough": S + be + adj + enoughShe is tall enough to play volleyball.
5. Trong cấu trúc: so + adj + thatThe weather was so bad that we decided to stay at home.
6. Dùng đuôi các đang so sánhMeat is more expensive than fish.
Dấu hiệu nhận biết tính từ:
-ful (helpful), -less (homeless), -ly (friendly), -al (national), -ble (acceptable), -ive (active), -ous (famous), -ish (selfish), -y (foggy), -like (childlike), -ic (scientific), -ed (bored), -ing (interesting), -ary (necessary), -ant (important), -ent (different)

III. TRANG TU (ADVERB) - Vị trí trong câu

Vị tríVí dụ
1. Truoc động từ thường và giua tro động từ và động từ thường (đặc biet là các trạng từ chỉ tan suat: always, usually...)They seldom get up early in the morning.
I have recently finished my homework.
I don't usually go to school late.
2. Truoc tính từ: be/feel/look... + adv + adjShe is very nice.
He looks extremely unwell.
3. Sau "too": V(thường) + too + adv!The teacher speaks too quickly.
4. Truoc "enough": V(thường) + adv + enoughThe teacher speaks slowly enough for us to understand.
5. Trong cấu trúc: V(thường) + so + adv + thatJack drove so fast that he caused an accident.
6. Dùng cuối câu (trạng từ thời gian)I finished my essay last week.
7. Thuong dùng ở đầu câu/giữa câu và cach các thành phan khác của câu bang đầu ","Last summer I came back my home country.
It's raining hard. Tom, however, goes to school.
Dấu hiệu nhận biết trạng từ:
Adv = adj + -ly (beautifully, usefully, carefully, strongly, badly)

Ngoại lệ: Một số từ có đuôi "-ly" nhưng là tính từ, không phải trạng từ: daily, early, elderly, friendly, likely, lively, lonely, lovely, manly, monthly, silly, ugly, unlikely, weekly, yearly

IV. ĐỘNG TỪ (VERB) - Vị trí trong câu

Vị tríVí dụ
1. Thuong dùng sau chủ ngữLam Anh plays volleyball everyday.
2. Dùng sau trạng từ chỉ tan suatI usually get up late.
Dấu hiệu nhận biết động từ:
-ate (compensate), -ain (maintain), -flect (reflect), -flict (inflict), -spect (respect), -scrib (describe), -ceive (deceive), -fy (modify), -ise/-ize (realize), -ude (include), -ide (divide), -dus (evade), -tend (extend)

exercises.question: The government should take some measures to protect _______ species.
exercises.explanation: Can một tính từ trước danh từ 'species'. 'Endangered' (bi để doa) là tính từ dùng nghia.

exercises.question: Turtles and tortoises are known to be threatened with _______.
exercises.explanation: Sau giới từ 'with' can danh từ. 'Extinction' là danh từ (sự tuyệt chủng).

exercises.question: They are going to _______ the pool to 2 meters.
exercises.explanation: Sau 'going to' can động từ nguyên mẫu. 'Deepen' = làm sau hon.

exercises.question: We were awarded a _______.
exercises.explanation: Sau mạo từ 'a' can danh từ. 'Penalty' = hinh phat, là danh từ phù hợp nhất.

exercises.question: Choosing a career is one of the most important _______ you will make in life.
exercises.explanation: Can danh từ làm tân ngữ. 'Decisions' (quyết định) là danh từ số nhiều phù hợp.

exercises.question: All of the students appreciate the _______ of English learning.
exercises.explanation: Sau mạo từ 'thế' can danh từ. 'Importance' (sự quan trong) là danh từ.

exercises.question: We can enjoy live programmes through _______ satellites.
exercises.explanation: Truoc danh từ 'satellites' can tính từ hoặc danh từ bỏ nghia. 'Communication satellites' = ve tính truyen thong.

exercises.question: Computers are _______ used in schools and universities.
exercises.explanation: Can trạng từ bỏ nghia cho động từ 'used'. 'Widely' = một cach rong rai.

exercises.question: She has made an _______ for the job as a nursery teacher because she likes children.
exercises.explanation: Sau 'an' can danh từ. 'Make an application' = nop don ung tuyen.

exercises.question: Daisy has been out of work for 3 months. She stays at home and does the housework_______.
exercises.explanation: Can trạng từ bỏ nghia cho động từ 'does'. 'Disappointedly' = một cach thất vọng.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
To prepare his science works, Faraday often spent whole days in the laboratory.
(A) prepare (B) science (C) spent (D) laboratory
exercises.explanation: 'Science' là danh từ, nhưng ở đây can tính từ bỏ nghia cho danh từ 'works'. Phai sua thành 'scientific'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
They ride their bicycle to the countryside for please.
(A) their (B) to (C) for (D) please
exercises.explanation: Sau giới từ 'for' can danh từ. 'Please' là động từ, phải sua thành 'pleasure' (niem vui).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
He was sadness because he couldn't pay his debts.
(A) sadness (B) because (C) pay (D) debts
exercises.explanation: Sau 'was' (động từ lien ket) can tính từ. 'Sadness' là danh từ, phải sua thành 'sad'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
The representatives joining the festival were from different national.
(A) representatives (B) joining (C) were (D) national
exercises.explanation: Sau tính từ 'different' can danh từ. 'National' là tính từ, phải sua thành 'nations' (quốc giá).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
The teacher often courage the students to ask questions.
(A) teacher (B) courage (C) to ask (D) questions
exercises.explanation: 'Courage' là danh từ (sự dùng câm). O đây can động từ = 'encourages' (khuyến khích).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
In some countries, black people do not have equal with white people.
(A) countries (B) black (C) equal (D) white
exercises.explanation: 'Equal' là tính từ, nhưng sau 'have' can danh từ. Phai sua thành 'equality' (sự binh đang).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
Many industry developed countries spend much money preventing environmental pollution.
(A) industry (B) spend (C) much (D) environmental
exercises.explanation: 'Industry' là danh từ. Truoc danh từ 'developed countries' can tính từ. Sua thành 'industrially' hoặc 'industrial'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
When foreigners ask him, he answers in English automatic.
(A) When (B) foreigners (C) answers (D) automatic
exercises.explanation: Can trạng từ bỏ nghia cho động từ 'answers'. 'Automatic' là tính từ, phải sua thành 'automatically'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
Special drugs should be manufacture and dispensed carefully.
(A) Special (B) drugs (C) manufacture (D) carefully
exercises.explanation: Sau 'should be' can quá khứ phan từ (bị động). 'Manufacture' là động từ nguyên mẫu, phải sua thành 'manufactured'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
He often went to work late, consequence he was sacked.
(A) went (B) to work (C) consequence (D) sacked
exercises.explanation: 'Consequence' là danh từ. O đây can trạng từ lien ket = 'consequently' (do do, vì vậy).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
We should learn all the new words by heart in order to rich our vocabulary.
(A) learn (B) by heart (C) rich (D) vocabulary
exercises.explanation: Sau 'to' (in order to) can động từ nguyên mẫu. 'Rich' là tính từ, phải sua thành 'enrich' (làm giàu).
